heading: Limitation with respect to duties of medical facilities
label: 300ff–137 Limitation with respect to duties of medical facilities
notes: Effective DateSection effective as if enacted on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2009 Amendment; Revival of Section note under .Sept. 30, 2009section 2(a)(3)(B) of Pub. L. 111–87section 300ff–11 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective as if enacted on , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2009 Amendment; Revival of Section note under .Sept. 30, 2009section 2(a)(3)(B) of Pub. L. 111–87section 300ff–11 of this title

children.text: shall apply only to medical information possessed by the facility during the period in which the facility is treating the victim for conditions arising from the emergency, or during the 60-day period beginning on the date on which the victim is transported by emergency response employees to the facility, whichever period expires first; and

shall not apply to any extent after the expiration of the 30-day period beginning on the expiration of the applicable period referred to in paragraph (1), except that such duties shall apply with respect to any request under received by a medical facility before the expiration of such 30-day period.section 300ff–133(c) of this title
